mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TC_FILE WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT * FROM TC_FILE WHERE FILE_UUID = #{fileUuid} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TC_FILE SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE FILE_UUID = #{fileUuid}
UPDATE TC_FILE SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
